title: Avoid field dependency injection
description: Field injection hides dependencies and makes code harder to test and maintain. Prefer constructor or setter injection to ensure dependencies are explicit and to improve code quality and testability. Refactoring away from field injection leads to more robust and maintainable applications.
recommendation: Refactor field-injected dependencies to use constructor or setter injection instead.

checks.message: Refactor field-injected dependencies to use constructor or setter injection instead.
